title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Hello everybody! Today, I'm going to a music festival. I got will call tickets, so I just have to pick them up at the ticket booth. But I already see there's a huge line there, so let's get going right away.
I got my wristband now. I'm going to check the timetable for the lineup. I think Laos is the headliner, but my favorite artist is Jesse Reyes. I'm so excited.
I think she's going to come on stage in a bit. I'm definitely going to lose my voice at this one.
We're sitting on the lawn waiting for Laos. I'm so curious what his set list is going to be.

title: will / shall
examples: Hello everybody! Today, I'm going to a music festival. I got will call tickets, so I just have to pick them up at the ticket booth. But I already see there's a huge line there, so let's get going right away.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: I can't make up my mind though. There's so much good stuff here. After lots of looking around, I found my favorite stall. The first thing I learned how to say in Korean.

title: have to / must
examples: Hello everybody! Today, I'm going to a music festival. I got will call tickets, so I just have to pick them up at the ticket booth. But I already see there's a huge line there, so let's get going right away.
